name: TestLink
description: Veteran open-source web-based test management system supporting test cases, plans, execution and reporting with issue tracker integrations.

seo.title: TestLink — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: TestLink: Veteran open-source web-based test management system supporting test cases, plans, execution and reporting with issue tracker integrations.

when_to_use: Test case management with plan and execution tracking
Jira and Bugzilla integration for defect traceability
Test suite organization across releases and milestones
Reporting on test coverage and execution progress

pros: Test cases, plans, execution, reporting in one
cons: Manual test focus, weak on automation integration
TestRail and Xray dominate modern choices
review.verdict: A free option for self-hosted test management, though the UX gap vs TestRail and Xray is hard to justify.
review.best_for: Teams with strict self-hosting needs and tight budgets for QA tooling
review.not_for: Modern QA teams where TestRail or Xray pay off in usability
